commands.review_summary:
The PR adds QMD add-error stderr parsing to emit a manual stale-collection removal hint when path/pattern metadata is unavailable, keeps automatic rebind limited to verified metadata, and adds regression coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. The linked report gives exact QMD conflict stderr, current main shows name-only list rows cannot be matched by path/pattern and fall through to the skipped-add path, and QMD 2.1.0 emits the parsed stderr shape.
commands.review_followup: External real behavior proof is still required and cannot be supplied by an automated repair branch; maintainer review should resume after proof and checks are clean.

commands.review_summary: The PR adds a QMD add-error parser that extracts the stale collection name for unverifiable path/pattern conflicts, logs a manual `qmd collection remove <name>` repair hint without automatic removal, and adds regression coverage for the stderr-only legacy-list case.
